content.en:
True River Valley, Taijiu Temple.

This is the residence of the elders of the Supreme Dao Realm powerhouse for too long.

Ye Tian came here to visit Elder Taijiu.

"Too long Elder!"

"Elder Dongguang!"

Ye Tian and Taijiu greeted each other.

Immediately, they began to talk.

Gradually, Ye Tian asked for the question of how to improve the rules of the Supreme Dao.

"Elder for too long, I found that the Supreme Dao rules are difficult to improve, is there any way to quickly comprehend the Supreme Dao rules?" Ye Tian asked.

Elder Taijiu smiled bitterly: "I also want to quickly comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao, but it is too difficult, it must be very slow to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao by yourself, and you can only rely on external objects, and our True River Valley is a small force, and there is no treasure to assist in comprehending the rules of the Supreme Dao." Any kind of treasure that can quickly assist in comprehending the rules of the Supreme Dao will cause many battles in the Supreme Dao realm. However, there are some Supreme Dao Formations that can assist in the comprehension of the Supreme Dao rules, such as the backer behind our True River Valley, Taisu Palace, has disclosed a Supreme Dao Formation-the Guiding Dao Great Array, as long as you pay a specific resource, you can use the Guiding Dao Great Array to comprehend the Supreme Dao Rules. "

"Elder Taijiu, the backer behind our True River Valley is the Taisu Palace????"

Ye Tian was shocked.

What is the strength of Taisu Palace, he naturally knows that it is the top force second only to Wuji Heavenly Palace in the Wuji Domain, although it is far inferior to Wuji Heavenly Palace, but it also crushes other forces, has a large number of Supreme Dao Realm powerhouses, and its reputation is also resounding throughout Wuji Heavenly Palace!

True River Valley is a small force that can't be smaller, and it can be related to Taisu Palace.

Elder Taijiu continued, "Because the son of the Lord of the True River Valley of the True River Valley and a woman from the Taisu Palace are in a Dao realm, it is a Taoist relationship that allows the True River Valley to have a relationship with the Taisu Palace. Materials like the ones you were looking for in the True Pole Land before were handed over to the Taisu Palace in exchange for some of the resources we needed. Even the True River Secret Medicine was begged from Taisu Palace and changed its name. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian also wondered, how could such a weak force in the True River Valley create the formula of the True River Secret Medicine?

It turned out to be from Taisu Palace!

Although the True River Valley has some relationship with Taisu Palace, this relationship is not of much use at all.

It is also because of this that Zhenhe Valley does not dare to use the name of Taisu Palace indiscriminately.

In addition, if True River Valley wants to borrow the Approach Array, it has to give resources and materials, otherwise it still can't be used.

"Elder Dongguang, I advise you not to have too much expectation, I also want to borrow the Great Array of Guiding Dao to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao, but unfortunately the materials and resources required by the Taisu Palace are too precious, and I can't find them!" said Elder Taijiu.

"Thank you for your advice!"

Ye Tian then left.

Just because the elder couldn't find the materials to use the Approach Array didn't mean he couldn't find them.

......

Taixuan Ancient Capital.

It is subordinate to Taisu Palace.

Ye Tian kept hurrying from the True River Valley and came here.

There is a large array here, and it is not too far away from the True River Valley.

After coming to the Taixuan Ancient Capital, Ye Tian inquired a little and knew the requirements for using the Approach Array.

Taisu Palace has made a list of many resources, as long as you gather some of the resources above, you can use the Approach Array.

In fact, it was the Taisu Palace that earned it, but many Supreme Dao Realms were too eager for the Great Array of Guiding Dao, and they were willing to accept it even if they paid more price.

However, the Supreme Dao Realm of ordinary small forces actually can't gather these resources, and only some powerful forces attached to the Taisu Palace can hope to gather resources and let a few Supreme Dao Realms come here to comprehend the Supreme Dao rules.

And.

The Great Array of Guiding Dao Arrays needs to wait for a batch of Dao Realms to open together, and there is a time limit.

The next time to open the Great Array of Initiation Paths is 1,300 years later, which is quite sufficient.

After Ye Tian learned about the materials needed by Taisu Palace, he bought some more information and prepared to collect these materials.

After his research, he felt that the most accessible material was undoubtedly the Ultimate Blood Gold.

There are many places in the Infinite Domain that can give birth to Supreme Dao Blood Gold, but the closest place with the most Supreme Dao Blood Gold is undoubtedly the Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss.

The Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss used to be a battlefield where countless Supreme Dao Realm battles were fought in the primeval era of the Infinite Domain, and finally countless Supreme Dao Realm blood was sprinkled here, and after a long period of evolution, it gradually gave birth to the Supreme Dao Blood Gold.

In fact, the Supreme Dao Blood Gold is a material that is gradually derived from the Supreme Dao Stone and the Supreme Dao Realm Blood absorbing the power of the Origin and the Supreme Dao Rules in a special environment.

Taisu Palace and Wuji Heavenly Palace are both buying a large number of Supreme Dao Blood Gold, but what the Supreme Dao Blood Gold is used for, many Supreme Dao Realms don't know.

Like the Guiding Dao Great Array, if you want to use it once, you only need to gather 100 pieces of Supreme Dao Blood Gold.

However, many Supreme Dao Realms entered the Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss, and they didn't even find a piece of Supreme Dao Blood Gold, so they fell into it.

The danger of the Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss mainly lies in the Supreme Dao Blood Beasts, they have inherited the bloodline power of the Supreme Dao Realm, coupled with the evolution of the special environment, they are powerful, but they have no wisdom, and they rely on the environment of the Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss, once they come out, their kind of body will not be able to maintain, and they will gradually collapse.

Therefore, the Supreme Dao Blood Beast is a crippled species and can only live in the Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss.

In addition, the Supreme Dao Realm above the Triple Extreme cannot enter the Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss, and it does not mean that it really cannot be entered, but once it enters, it will trigger the rule suppression of the Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss.

The rules there are extremely chaotic, and all kinds of supreme rule power left over from the primeval era, once this rule power is triggered, it can directly suppress the threefold or even fourfold, fifth-fold Dao realm powerhouses.

Therefore, only the first to the Dao realm or the second to the Dao realm would dare to enter the supreme Dao abyss.

Of course.

If you use a special secret technique or a secret treasure of the Supreme Dao, you can also let the Triple Supreme Dao Realm enter it, but you can't use your strength to the fullest.

"The Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss is very suitable for me, I can let the copy body explore again and again, and it shouldn't be difficult to find a hundred Supreme Dao Blood Gold!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Then, he rushed to the Heavenly Abyss.

The various entrances to the Dao Heavenly Abyss are controlled by forces such as the Wuji Heavenly Palace and the Taisu Palace, and if they don't have a relationship, they can't get in.

Ye Tian's duplicate body is an elder of the True River Valley, and he can go through the channel of Taisu Palace, so naturally he will not be stopped.

Soon, he came to the Heavenly Abyss, and then entered.

As soon as he entered the Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss, Ye Tian sensed the chaotic Supreme Dao rules, which were densely filled with the void.

"Let's find a safe place first, and copy the cave light and copy the body!"

Ye Tian decided.
